info.title: WpfToAvalonia CLI
info.description: Cross-platform command-line tool that applies WpfToAvalonia analyzers and code fixes in bulk.

options.name: --scope
options.description: Scope to apply fixes: document, project, or solution.

options.name: --project
options.description: Project name to target when running on a solution.

options.name: --diagnostics
options.description: Diagnostic IDs to apply fixes for.

options.name: --code-action
options.description: Code action title to apply when multiple fixes are available.

options.name: --mode
options.description: Execution mode: sequential, parallel, or fixall. [default: sequential]
